name: ORIGINCLEAR, INC.
summary: PART I . Organizational History OriginClear, Inc., (the Company, OCLN or OriginClear) was incorporated in Nevada on June 1, 2007. Initially focused on research, development, and licensing, the Company transitioned to commercialization in 2015. Our principal offices are located at 13575 58th Street North, Suite 200, Clearwater, FL 33760. Our main telephone number is (727) 440-4603. More information is available on our website, www.OriginClear.com, however, the website content is not incorporated ...
